mapper.select: SELECT room_id, room_name, capacity, location, has_video, has_phone, amenities, active, created_at FROM platform_v3.rm_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT b.booking_id, b.room_id, r.room_name, b.booker_no, b.title, b.start_at, b.end_at, b.attendees, b.livekit_room, b.status, b.created_at FROM platform_v3.rm_booking b JOIN platform_v3.rm_room r ON r.room_id = b.room_id WHERE b.status = 'BOOKED' AND b.room_id = #{roomId}
AND b.end_at > #{from}::timestamptz
AND b.start_at < #{to}::timestamptz
ORDER BY b.start_at

SELECT b.booking_id, b.room_id, r.room_name, b.booker_no, b.title, b.start_at, b.end_at, b.attendees, b.livekit_room, b.status, b.created_at FROM platform_v3.rm_booking b JOIN platform_v3.rm_room r ON r.room_id = b.room_id WHERE b.booker_no = #{bookerNo}
AND b.end_at < NOW()
AND b.end_at >= NOW() AND b.status = 'BOOKED'
ORDER BY b.start_at DESC

SELECT b.booking_id, b.room_id, r.room_name, b.booker_no, b.title, b.start_at, b.end_at, b.attendees, b.livekit_room, b.status, b.created_at FROM platform_v3.rm_booking b JOIN platform_v3.rm_room r ON r.room_id = b.room_id WHERE b.booking_id = #{bookingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.rm_booking (room_id, booker_no, title, start_at, end_at, attendees, livekit_room, status, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{bookerNo}, #{title}, #{startAt}::timestamptz, #{endAt}::timestamptz, #{attendees}, #{livekitRoom}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'BOOKED'), NOW())
